cards.name: Hozier

trait.name: Take Me to Church
trait.description: Passive: all Music category cards in deck gain +5% Strength

move.name: Cherry Wine
move.description: Active: deals damage and lowers target Agility for 1 turn

cards.lore: Singer-songwriter from Bray, Co. Wicklow, known for blending blues, soul and Irish folk influences.

cards.name: Turlough O'Carolan

move.name: Carolan's Concerto
move.description: Active: restores Constitution to one ally card

cards.lore: Blind harper and composer, often called Ireland's national composer.

cards.name: Brian Boru

trait.name: High King
trait.description: Passive: all Historical category cards in deck gain +5% Constitution

move.name: Clontarf Charge
move.description: Active: deals heavy damage, stuns target for 1 turn

cards.lore: High King of Ireland, famed for his victory at the Battle of Clontarf in 1014.

cards.name: St Brigid

trait.name: Eternal Flame
trait.description: Passive: deck starts battle with +5% Constitution

move.name: Brigid's Cross
move.description: Active: restores Constitution to entire deck

cards.lore: Patron saint of Ireland, associated with healing, poetry and protection.

cards.name: Joanne McNally

trait.name: Quick Wit
trait.description: Passive: +10% Agility when card health is below 50%

move.name: Prosecco Express
move.description: Active: lowers target Strength for 2 turns

cards.lore: Comedian and podcaster known for The Prosecco Express.
